title: Polyotus lanuginosus
intro:
There is not enough information on Polyotus lanuginosus. However, I can provide information on Polygala lanuginosa which seems to be a synonym of Polygala lutea. 

Polygala lutea is a plant species in the family Polygalaceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, and is said to be useful in treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.

The bioactive constituents of Polygala lutea include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.

Polygala lutea is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
